creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
> Do you have any possibility to install and use poudriere locally by the way?
> 
> I'll move to patch-ready but I'd gladly take a single poudriere log over 8x
> "finished" redport status.

I understand. I will set up a poudriere jail as soon as possible, but in my machine, it will take time to build qt at least for the first time...
